title: dalechampia bidentata var. genuina
intro: Dalechampia bidentata var. genuina, also known as the velvet tree or touch-me-not, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be applied topically to the skin to treat wounds and skin conditions.
